calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Termination Of The Cyprus Connection Trust
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Termination Of The Cyprus Connection Trust
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Muntean for Paul Dijkstra and Kim Clark.

Mr. Muntean argued that MeesPierson is in the British Virgin Islands and has not been served, that the whole Trust was a scham in order to avoid taxation, that there are no Trustees and no one at MeesPierson for him to serve, etc. The Court stated that the Trustee has not received notice and has not waived 30-day notice. The Petition for Termination of The Cypress Connection Trust was continued to May 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proof of service to the Trustee.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Termination Of The Cyprus Connection Trust
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
